steps.title: Place however parenthetically
steps.content: The sentence says relatively few particles reach Earth's surface because most burn up in the mesosphere. Here however interrupts the sentence before the since-clause and needs commas on both sides.

steps.title: Use paired commas
steps.content: Choice A turns the since-clause into a fragment, Choice B misuses a semicolon and omits a comma, and Choice C creates a malformed comma-semicolon pattern. The remaining choice brackets however with commas. The answer is D.
